chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail No. S- 1295 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.01.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Muhammad Jamil Ahmed, Advocate for applicant Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G. Mr. Muhammad Jamil Ahmed Advocate has informed me that the trial is about to conclude. The case is now fixed before the trial court on 3.2.2026 for judgment. Following the principle enunciated in the case of _ it would not be appropriate to either dismiss or allow the bail, hence this bail application is stands disposed of with the expectation that the learned Judge of trial court will pass the judgment imminently. Mr. Muhammad Jamil Ahmed Advocate has further requested that Rs. 25,000/- (Rupees Twenty Five Thousand) cost imposed upon applicant Ghulam Qadir may be waived; however, after going through the record I do not see any ground to show any leniency to Ghulam Qadir; therefore, the request of Mr. Muhammad Jamil Ahmed Advocate is not acceded. This Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
